StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(t.title) AS american_vhs_movie FROM job.company_type AS ct, job.info_type AS it, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info AS mi, job.title AS t WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies' AND mc.note LIKE '%(VHS)%' AND mc.note LIKE '%(USA)%' AND mc.note LIKE '%(1994)%' AND mi.info IN ('USA', 'America') AND t.production_year > 2010 AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND it.id = mi.info_type_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(VHS)%' AND [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(USA)%' AND [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(1994)%'
